name: Martyr

m.text: a Dagger worth at least 1 CP

entries: You touch a dead creature that died within the last minute and transfer your life essence into it. The target returns to life with {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to your current {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} total. You immediately drop to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} (which nothing can prevent) with two failed {@variantrule Death Saving Throw|XPHB|Death Saving Throws}, and you must immediately make a Death {@variantrule Save|XPHB}. You can't regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or become {@variantrule Stable|XPHB} until after you make this save.
